title: crataegus viridis var. ovata
intro: Crataegus viridis var. ovata, also known as the green hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus viridis var. ovata include reduced blood pressure, improved cardiovascular health, and relief from symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
